title: T-013 — QA-001 Quality Dashboard (6-widget grid, prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-013 — QA-001 Quality Dashboard

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-001 layout (3x2 grid, 6 widgets), §8.5 prototype qa_dashboard
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build the Quality Dashboard page `/quality` with a 3x2 grid of 6 widgets (Active Holds, Inspection Backlog, Open NCRs by Severity, CCP Compliance Today, First-Time Pass Rate trend, Allergen Changeover Gates) plus top toolbar (date range filter, site filter), auto-refresh every 60s.

## Implementation contract
1. Server Component `apps/web/src/app/quality/page.tsx` reads counts via parallel queries (listActiveHolds, inspection backlog count, NCR severity counts, CCP compliance %, FTPR 30-day trend, allergen gates today).
2. Each widget is a small Client Component with click handler routing to QA-010/QA-030/QA-040/QA-050/QA-070.
3. Auto-refresh via SWR or `revalidatePath` every 60s (button + interval).
4. 1:1 prototype parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/dashboard.jsx:3-147` (qa_dashboard).

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/dashboard/ActiveHoldsWidget.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/dashboard/InspectionBacklogWidget.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/dashboard/OpenNcrsWidget.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/dashboard/CcpComplianceWidget.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/dashboard/FirstTimePassRateWidget.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/dashboard/AllergenGatesWidget.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/dashboard/__tests__/dashboard.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/dashboard.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the dashboard renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/dashboard.jsx:3-147, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (top toolbar with date range Select + site Select + manual refresh button, 3x2 widget grid in the same order: Active Holds, Inspection Backlog, Open NCRs, CCP Compliance, First-Time Pass Rate, Allergen Gates), visuals (shadcn Card per widget with same color tokens for KPI urgency: red ≤1d, amber 1-3d, blue normal), and interaction parity (each widget click routes to its target QA screen, auto-refresh interval 60s with manual refresh button) — verified by RTL render test asserting 6 cards in correct order plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given counts are 0 across the board, when the page loads, then each widget shows its empty state copy (no NaN, no broken icons)
3. Given the user has role auditor_readonly, when widgets render, then click navigation works (read-only routes) and Active Holds widget hides the 'Create hold' shortcut

## Parity checklist
- 3x2 grid: row1=[Active Holds, Inspection Backlog, Open NCRs]; row2=[CCP Compliance, FTPR, Allergen Gates]
- Top toolbar: date range Select + site Select + manual refresh icon button (right-aligned)
- Each widget = shadcn Card with title row (key icon + title + count badge)
- Urgency colors: critical=destructive, warning=amber-500, ok=blue-500 (matching shadcn theme tokens used by prototype)
- Auto-refresh every 60s, with last-updated timestamp inside the toolbar
- Same Lucide icons as prototype (Lock, ClipboardCheck, AlertTriangle, ThermometerSun, TrendingUp, ShieldAlert)
- Click on a widget navigates to its target route via next/link

pipeline_inputs.description: Quality Dashboard server-rendered page with 6 widgets (3x2 grid), top toolbar, auto-refresh 60s, 1:1 prototype parity.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component composes 6 widget cards in 3x2 grid matching design/Monopilot Design System/quality/dashboard.jsx:3-147 verbatim. Each widget = shadcn Card with title icon + KPI count + click route. Auto-refresh 60s via SWR or revalidatePath with manual refresh button. Top toolbar: date range Select + site Select + refresh button. RTL render test snapshots widget order and counts; parity checklist in details defines structural/visual/interaction comparison points. Honor prototype translation notes: Lucide icons match, no drift to non-shadcn primitives, urgency color tokens preserved.
out_of_scope: Do not implement P2 rich charts (Recharts trend lines beyond P1 simple sparkline)
Do not implement materialized view mv_quality_kpis_daily (out of scope this task)
Do not modify the routes its widgets navigate to
acceptance_criteria: Given the dashboard renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/dashboard.jsx:3-147, then it matches on structural parity (toolbar + 3x2 grid in fixed widget order), visual parity (shadcn Card + Select + Button only, urgency tokens preserved), and interaction parity (each widget click navigates to its target route, auto-refresh 60s with manual refresh) — verified by RTL render asserting 6 cards in declared order plus the parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
Given counts are 0 across all widgets, when the page renders, then each widget shows an empty-state copy (no NaN, no broken icons)
Given role=auditor_readonly, when the dashboard renders, then click navigation still works and the 'Create hold' shortcut on Active Holds widget is hidden
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/dashboard/__tests__/dashboard.test.tsx with RTL render asserting 6 cards in fixed order, empty states, and role-based hide of Create-hold shortcut
risk_red_lines: Do not use native HTML select (must be shadcn Select per translation notes)
Do not break auto-refresh on tab visibility change (pause when hidden, resume on visible)
Do not skip role-based hide of Create-hold (auditor must not see action shortcut)
